# text2img usage guide for AI agents

`text2img` is a free, no-registration AI text-to-image tool that runs as a single
Cloudflare Worker (Next.js App Router compiled through OpenNext). The browser
POSTs a prompt to `/api/generate`; the Worker resolves a model, runs it through a
per-model **adapter** onto the Cloudflare Workers AI binding (`env.AI.run`), and
streams a PNG back. There is **no server-side database** — generation history is
browser-local (IndexedDB blobs + localStorage metadata), and the optional access
password is Argon2id-hashed client-side.

Primary docs:

- README: ./README.md
- Design spec (authoritative): ./DESIGN.md
- Runtime config (annotated): ./wrangler.jsonc
- Model catalog + prompts: ./src/lib/data.ts

Part of the `@cdlab/projects-monorepo`; run all commands from the repo root with
`pnpm --filter @cdlab/text2img <script>`.

## What it is

- **One Worker, two surfaces.** UI page `/[locale]` (`en`/`zh`, client
  component). API: `POST /api/generate`, `GET /api/models`, `GET /api/prompts`.
- **No server DB, no auth.** History lives in the browser. Optional `PASSWORDS`
  gate on the generate endpoint only.
- **Runtime:** OpenNext `.open-next/worker.js` on Workers `nodejs_compat` — NOT
  the classic Next edge runtime (no `export const runtime` anywhere). `env` /
  bindings come from `getCloudflareContext()`; `next dev` gets real bindings only
  because `next.config.ts` calls `initOpenNextCloudflareForDev()`.

## The generate flow (src/app/api/generate/route.ts + src/lib/hooks/useGeneration.ts)

Client (`useGeneration.ts`, TanStack useMutation):
1. `onMutate` — `genid.nextId()` → insert PENDING record; record `performance.now()`.
2. `generateImage` — if password set, replace with `hashPasswordFn(pw)` (Argon2id)
   BEFORE POST; consume response as `Blob`.
3. `onSuccess` → `completeResult(id, blob, time)`; `onError` → mark FAILED.

Server (`route.ts` POST):
1. parse JSON → `GenerateParams`; `env = getCloudflareContext().env`.
2. password gate: if `process.env.PASSWORDS` non-empty → 401 (missing) / 403
   (no `verifyPasswordFn` match). Empty = open.
3. require `prompt` AND `model` in body → 400.
4. `findModelById(AVAILABLE_MODELS, model)` → 400 unknown; `disabled` → 400.
5. adapter = `MODEL_TYPE_CONFIGS[type]` ?? `MODEL_GROUP_CONFIGS[group]` ?? default.
6. `adapter.prepareInputs(data)` → `env.AI.run(model.key, inputs)` → `adapter.processResponse`.
7. thrown errors → JSON 500.

## Model adapters (the core logic — src/app/api/generate/route.ts)

Each adapter is `{ prepareInputs, processResponse }`. Selection precedence: TYPE
config (img2img/inpainting) OVERRIDES group config.

- `defaultModelConfig` — bytedance, lykon, stabilityai, runwayml groups. Plain
  JSON inputs (1024×1024, num_steps 20, guidance 7.5); raw bytes → image/png.
- `blackForestLabsConfig` — black-forest-labs group. `flux-1-schnell`:
  `{prompt, steps}` with steps CLAMPED 4–8. Other FLUX: builds `multipart`
  FormData body → `{multipart:{body,contentType}}`; response is base64 JSON
  (`image` field) → decode → PNG.
- `leonardoConfig` — leonardo (disabled). steps 25, guidance 4; base64 or binary.
- `img2imgConfig` — img2img type. decodes `image_b64` → number-array `image`;
  512×512, strength 0.75.
- `inpaintingConfig` — inpainting type. adds `mask` from `mask_b64`, strength 1;
  reuses img2img processResponse.

Key invariants (do not "simplify" without reading DESIGN §4):
- TYPE config beats GROUP config — a runwayml img2img model uses img2imgConfig.
- Non-schnell FLUX needs a multipart body AND returns base64 JSON; SDXL/DreamShaper
  return raw PNG bytes. These are different Workers AI contracts, not redundancy.
- `flux-1-schnell` clamps steps to [4,8]; others pass steps through.

## Catalog & prompts (src/lib/data.ts)

- `AVAILABLE_MODELS: ModelGroup[]` — each `Model` has `id`, `name`, `key` (full
  `@cf/...` id for `env.AI.run`), `group`, `type` (text2img|img2img|inpainting),
  `disabled`. `/api/models` and `/api/prompts` are trivial `NextResponse.json`.
- Enabled: FLUX.2 klein 9B/4B, FLUX.2 dev, FLUX.1 schnell, ByteDance SDXL
  Lightning, Lykon DreamShaper 8 LCM, Stability SDXL Base 1.0, Runway v1.5
  img2img/inpainting. Disabled: Leonardo Lucid Origin/Phoenix.
- Disabled models STAY in the catalog (served by `/api/models`) but are rejected
  at generate time (400). `findModelById` (src/lib/utils.ts) flattens groups.
- Model `description` strings are Chinese-only display copy — not a contract.

## Client storage (src/store/useImageStore.ts + src/lib/storage.ts)

No server DB. Two browser stores:
- IndexedDB `text2img-images` (`createIDBStore<Blob>`) — PNG blobs by result id.
- localStorage `text2img-results` — Zustand persist, metadata only.

`partialize` persists ONLY completed results and STRIPS `imageUrl` + params
`password`/`image_b64`/`mask_b64` (no secrets / source bytes in localStorage).
`onRehydrateStorage` → `rehydrateBlobs()` re-reads blobs from IndexedDB and
rebuilds object URLs; a missing blob → FAILED `'Data lost'`. Object URLs are
session-only, revoked on remove/clearAll.

## Config & bindings (wrangler.jsonc, .env.example)

- `PASSWORDS` (`process.env.PASSWORDS`) — comma-separated access passwords for
  `/api/generate`; empty = open. `BUILD_TIME` — optional version badge value.
- Bindings: `AI` (Workers AI — REQUIRED), `ASSETS` (static), `IMAGES` (declared,
  UNUSED in code), `WORKER_SELF_REFERENCE`. Flags: `nodejs_compat`,
  `global_fetch_strictly_public`.
- `PASSWORDS` is NOT a `wrangler` var (as a var it shadows the Worker secret on
  every deploy). Set via `.env` locally, or GitHub secret `TEXT2IMG_PASSWORDS`
  synced by the deploy workflow.

## Gotchas for agents

- `env.AI` only exists inside a request via `getCloudflareContext()`; in `next dev`
  it works ONLY because of `initOpenNextCloudflareForDev()` in next.config.ts.
- The password plaintext NEVER goes over the wire — client hashes with Argon2id;
  server verifies hash-vs-configured-plaintext. Don't add plaintext logging.
- Non-schnell FLUX needs the multipart FormData wrapper; do not collapse the FLUX
  and default adapters.
- Disabled models are catalog-visible but rejected at generate time (400).
- `src/app/page.tsx` (redirect) and root `layout.tsx` are static-export/not-found
  shims — real routing is under `[locale]`.
- No tests exist (no test script, no test files). `build` is `next build`, which
  is NOT the deploy path — deploy is OpenNext (`opennextjs-cloudflare build && deploy`).

## Common commands

```bash
pnpm --filter @cdlab/text2img dev       # http://text2img.localhost:3355 (real bindings)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/text2img build     # next build (type-check + bundle; NOT deploy)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/text2img preview    # local Workers preview (OpenNext)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/text2img deploy     # OpenNext build & deploy (prefer deploy-text2img.yml)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/text2img cf-typegen # regenerate cloudflare-env.d.ts
```
